name: Scene
note: Base class for all 2D animations. Implement construct(self) with animation logic.

name: ThreeDScene
note: Base class for 3D animations. Supports camera rotation via self.set_camera_orientation().

name: MovingCameraScene
note: Scene whose camera can be panned/zoomed. Use self.camera.frame to move the viewport.

name: Create
note: Draws the border/stroke of a shape. Use for geometric shapes like Circle, Square, Line.

name: Write
note: Animates writing a Text or VMobject stroke by stroke. Use for Text objects.

name: FadeIn
note: Fades the mobject in from transparent. Optional shift direction (e.g. UP) for slide-in effect.

name: FadeOut
note: Fades the mobject out to transparent. Use to remove elements cleanly.

name: Transform
note: Morphs mobject into target_mobject in-place. The original mobject becomes the target.

name: ReplacementTransform
note: Like Transform but replaces mobject with target in the scene. Cleaner than Transform for most use cases.

name: GrowFromCenter
note: Scales the mobject from zero size growing outward from its center.

name: DrawBorderThenFill
note: First draws the border, then fills the interior. Good for filled shapes.

name: Indicate
note: Briefly highlights a mobject by scaling and flashing it. Good for pointing attention.

name: Flash
note: Emits a flash of lines from a point. Use for highlighting a location.

name: Circumscribe
note: Draws a shape around a mobject briefly to highlight it.

name: AnimationGroup
note: Plays multiple animations simultaneously (lag_ratio=0) or staggered (lag_ratio>0).

name: LaggedStart
note: Plays animations with a stagger delay between each. Default lag_ratio=0.2.

name: Succession
note: Plays animations one after another (fully sequential). Each starts when the previous ends.

name: MoveToTarget
note: Moves mobject to its .target copy. Set target via mobject.generate_target() then modify mobject.target.

name: Circle
note: A circle shape. Use fill_opacity=1 for a filled circle.

name: Square
note: A square shape.

name: Rectangle
note: A rectangle. Specify width and height explicitly.

name: Triangle
note: An equilateral triangle pointing up.

name: Polygon
note: A polygon defined by vertex coordinates. Vertices are numpy arrays.

name: Arrow
note: An arrow from start to end. Use buff=0 to make it reach the exact points.

name: DoubleArrow
note: An arrow with heads on both ends.

name: Line
note: A straight line between two points.

name: DashedLine
note: A dashed straight line.

name: Arc
note: A circular arc. angle is in radians. Use PI from manim imports.

name: Dot
note: A small filled circle, typically used as a point marker.

name: Text
note: Renders plain text using Pango. Does NOT require LaTeX. Use this instead of MathTex/Tex.

name: VGroup
note: Groups multiple VMobjects so they can be transformed/moved/faded together.

name: Group
note: Like VGroup but accepts any Mobject (not just VMobject). Use VGroup when possible.

name: Axes
note: A 2D coordinate axes. Use get_graph() to plot functions on it.
example:
axes = Axes(x_range=[-3,3,1], y_range=[-2,2,1])
graph = axes.plot(lambda x: x**2, color=BLUE)
self.play(Create(axes), Create(graph))

name: NumberLine
note: A single number line with tick marks.

name: NumberPlane
note: A full grid with labeled axes. Background grid is shown by default.

name: Brace
note: A curly brace under/over/beside a mobject. direction sets which side.

name: SurroundingRectangle
note: A rectangle that tightly surrounds a mobject, used for highlighting.

name: BulletedList
note: Creates a bulleted list from string items.

name: DecimalNumber
note: Displays a number that can be updated with .set_value(n).

name: always_redraw
note: Returns a mobject that redraws itself every frame by calling func(). Used for dynamic labels.

name: ValueTracker
note: Tracks a numerical value that can be animated. Use .get_value() and .animate.set_value().

name: DEGREES
note: Conversion factor from degrees to radians. Multiply angle in degrees by DEGREES.

name: PI
note: Mathematical constant pi. Available directly from manim import.

name: UP
note: Unit vector pointing up. Combine with scalars: UP * 2 means 2 units up.

name: DOWN
note: Unit vector pointing down.

name: LEFT
note: Unit vector pointing left.

name: RIGHT
note: Unit vector pointing right.

name: ORIGIN
note: The center of the scene.

name: next_to
note: Positions mobject next to another mobject in the given direction with a buffer gap.

name: move_to
note: Moves mobject's center to the given point or to the center of another mobject.

name: shift
note: Shifts mobject by the sum of the given vectors. Does not move to an absolute position.

name: scale
note: Scales the mobject by scale_factor relative to its center.

name: set_color
note: Sets the stroke/fill color of the mobject.

name: animate
note: Property that returns an animation of the mobject method call. Use inside self.play().

name: get_center
note: Returns the center point (np.ndarray) of the mobject's bounding box.

name: MathTex
note: DISABLED in this pipeline — requires a LaTeX installation which is unavailable. Use Text() instead for all labels and formulas.
example:
# WRONG: MathTex(r'a^2 + b^2 = c^2')
# RIGHT: Text('a² + b² = c²')

name: Tex
note: DISABLED in this pipeline — requires LaTeX. Use Text() for all text content.
